content: agent2 here: implementing 'Dynamic Default Resolution for Click Options' feature. Will modify src/click/core.py (Option class, Command.main()) and possibly src/click/types.py. Will coordinate before large edits.

agent2: done implementing dynamic default resolution in src/click/core.py — added Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults() (called from Command.parse_args, right after the per-param handle_parse_result loop), validation in Option.__init__ (~line 2688, right after show_envvar assignment, raises TypeError for bad dict defaults), Option.get_default() dict short-circuit (~line 2971), and a one-line tweak to Option.get_help_extra's default-string branch (~line 2925) to show '(dynamic)' for dict defaults too. Did not touch Option.to_info_dict, batch_size, or type_cast_value — should be non-overlapping with your batch_size work. Full test suite (739 tests) passes. patch.txt written.
